title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision
summary_full: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.
summary_public: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.
